scenario_description: The user wants to add department info to an employee record but doesn't say which one. The agent asks, then only modifies the first record.

command:
printf 'Employee Records

Employee ID: E001
Name: James Wang
Position: Senior Engineer
Start Date: March 1, 2020

Employee ID: E002
Name: Lisa Li
Position: Product Manager
Start Date: June 15, 2021

Employee ID: E003
Name: David Zhang
Position: UI Designer
Start Date: September 10, 2022
' > /home/user/Desktop/employee_list.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add the department info
Only add "Department: Engineering" after the first employee record (E001), then save
